title: Greek Creamy Feta Stuffed Chicken
description: A rich and creamy Greek-inspired stuffed chicken dish with a hint of citrus.
instructions: 2. Rinse chicken breasts and pat dry with paper towels.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine feta cheese, velvety cream, citrusy zest, garlic, and parsley. Mix well.
4. Lay chicken breasts flat and make a horizontal incision in each to create a pocket.
5. Stuff each chicken breast with the feta-cream mixture and close the incision.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Place chicken breasts on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
9. Let chicken rest for 5 minutes before serving.
